description: Handles 4 message types: (1) Investment with inline resolution — uses LLM to resolve common names to ticker symbols (stocks) or AMFI scheme codes (MFs), handles ambiguity by asking user to clarify, defaults MFs to Direct Growth, confirms resolved identifier before storing. Stores display_name + ticker_symbol/scheme_code + units + price. For gold: captures weight_grams, purity (confirms 22K default for jewellery), making_charges. (2) Liability Setup — captures all required fields. (3) Transaction Logging — 6 types, shorthand parsing. EMI auto-split using stored loan data; prompts for setup if missing. (4) Updates — CC outstanding/limit, asset values.

example_response.transaction_type: Type: income, expense, investment, asset, liability, emi, setup, update
